     The Numbers Business Report

Sex Tape (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $38,543,473Details
International Box Office $87,526,036
Worldwide Box Office $126,069,509
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,047,172
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,312,624
Total $7,359,796
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Jay and Annie first got together, their romantic connection was intense—but ten years and two kids later, the flame of their love needs a spark. To kick things up a notch, they decide—why not?—to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea—until they discover that their most private video is no longer private. With their reputations on the line, they know they’re just one click away from being laid bare to the world… but as their race to reclaim their video leads to a night they’ll never forget, they’ll find that their video will expose even more than they bargained for.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,608,152 (37.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.64 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,062 opening theaters/3,062 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,423,489

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 18th, 2014 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 16th, 2014 (Wide) (Trinidad)
July 16th, 2014 (Wide) (Jamaica)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Aruba)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Israel)
Video Release: October 21st, 2014 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, nudity, language and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2328, 6/25/2014)
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Amateur Porn, Dysfunctional Family, Internet, Mid-Life Crisis
Subgenre: Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Escape Artists, Media Rights Capital, LStar Capital
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When Jay and Annie first got together, their romantic connection was intense—but ten years and two kids later, the flame of their love needs a spark. To kick things up a notch, they decide—why not?—to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea—until they discover that their most private video is no longer private. With their reputations on the line, they know they’re just one click away from being laid bare to the world… but as their race to reclaim their video leads to a night they’ll never forget, they’ll find that their video will expose even more than they bargained for.
